falsification_conditions.condition: The price rises above the 200-day moving average by 10% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout would contradict the pattern's implied bearish consolidation, invalidating the 'bottom' hypothesis.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 3x the 30-day average on a single day within the 14-day window
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such extreme volume would indicate strong buying pressure, directly opposing the blowoff score's implication of distributional activity.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 breaks above the 2024 August peak by 8% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would confirm a sustained bullish trend rather than a bottoming process, falsifying the pattern match and HOLD signal.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
